name: Sarah M.
text: Hikaru made learning Japanese feel approachable from day one. After six months of weekly lessons, I was able to hold basic conversations during my trip to Tokyo. Her patience and teaching style are unmatched.

name: James T.
text: I passed the JLPT N3 on my first attempt thanks to Hikaru's structured prep sessions. She knew exactly which areas I needed to focus on and kept me motivated throughout the process.

name: The Rodriguez Family
text: Our kids look forward to their Japanese lesson every week. Hikaru makes it fun with games and cultural activities. Even we as parents have picked up quite a bit just from listening in!

name: David K.
text: I needed to improve my business Japanese for a new role working with our Tokyo office. Hikaru's lessons on keigo and business email etiquette gave me the confidence I needed.
